# ui.model_access { #app.ui.model_access }

`ui.model_access`



## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [citing_tab](#app.ui.model_access.citing_tab) | UI for the citing tab; how to cite BAM model results. |
| [tools_tab](#app.ui.model_access.tools_tab) | UI for the tools tab, providing resources for exploring BAM products. |
| [vignettes_tab](#app.ui.model_access.vignettes_tab) | UI for the vignettes tab, featuring vignettes for the BAMexploreR package. |

### citing_tab { #app.ui.model_access.citing_tab }

```python
ui.model_access.citing_tab()
```

UI for the citing tab; how to cite BAM model results.

### tools_tab { #app.ui.model_access.tools_tab }

```python
ui.model_access.tools_tab()
```

UI for the tools tab, providing resources for exploring BAM products.

### vignettes_tab { #app.ui.model_access.vignettes_tab }

```python
ui.model_access.vignettes_tab()
```

UI for the vignettes tab, featuring vignettes for the BAMexploreR package.
